deprecated_yaml.description:
Configuring InfluxDB connection settings using YAML is being removed. Your existing YAML connection configuration has been imported into the UI automatically.

Remove the `{domain}` connection and authentication keys from your `configuration.yaml` file and restart Home Assistant to fix this issue. Other options like `include`, `exclude`, and `tags` remain in YAML for now. 

The following keys should be removed:
- `api_version`
- `host`
- `port`
- `ssl`
- `verify_ssl`
- `ssl_ca_cert`
- `username`
- `password`
- `database`
- `token`
- `organization`
- `bucket`
- `path`
deprecated_yaml.title: The InfluxDB YAML configuration is being removed

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_conn.description:
Configuring InfluxDB connection settings using YAML is being removed but the import failed because Home Assistant could not connect to the InfluxDB server.

Please correct your YAML configuration and restart Home Assistant.

Alternatively you can remove the `{domain}` connection and authentication keys from your `configuration.yaml` file and continue to [set up the integration]({url}) manually. 

The following keys should be removed:
- `api_version`
- `host`
- `port`
- `ssl`
- `verify_ssl`
- `ssl_ca_cert`
- `username`
- `password`
- `database`
- `token`
- `organization`
- `bucket`
- `path`
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_conn.title: Failed to import InfluxDB YAML configuration

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_invalid_aut.description:
Configuring InfluxDB connection settings using YAML is being removed but the import failed because the provided credentials are invalid.

Please correct your YAML configuration and restart Home Assistant.

Alternatively you can remove the `{domain}` connection and authentication keys from your `configuration.yaml` file and continue to [set up the integration]({url}) manually. 

The following keys should be removed:
- `api_version`
- `host`
- `port`
- `ssl`
- `verify_ssl`
- `ssl_ca_cert`
- `username`
- `password`
- `database`
- `token`
- `organization`
- `bucket`
- `path`
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_invalid_aut.title: [%key:component::influxdb::issues::deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_connect::title%]

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_invalid_dat.description:
Configuring InfluxDB connection settings using YAML is being removed but the import failed because the specified database was not found.

Please correct your YAML configuration and restart Home Assistant.

Alternatively you can remove the `{domain}` connection and authentication keys from your `configuration.yaml` file and continue to [set up the integration]({url}) manually. 

The following keys should be removed:
- `api_version`

- `port`
- `ssl`
- `verify_ssl`
- `ssl_ca_cert`
- `username`
- `password`
- `database`
- `token`
- `organization`
- `bucket`
- `path`
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_invalid_dat.title: [%key:component::influxdb::issues::deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_connect::title%]

Alternatively you can remove the `{domain}` connection and authentication keys from your `configuration.yaml` file and continue to [set up the integration]({url}) manually.

- `username`

- `database`

- `path`
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_ssl_error.title: [%key:component::influxdb::issues::deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_connect::title%]
